creator: koder85@com2com.ru
text:
mpd cannot be installed from ports.

#cd /usr/ports/net/mpd && make install clean
..
===>  Installing for mpd-3.18_5
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checkink if net/mpd already installed
cd: can't cd to /usr/local/share/nls
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/net/mpd

No such problem in 6.2-RELEASE!

Fix: 

#mkdir /usr/local/share/nls
How-To-Repeat: 1. install freebsd
2. put mpd-3.18.tar.gz into /usr/ports/distfiles/mpd or configure your Internet connection
3. #cd /usr/ports/net/mpd && make install clean
